channel.title: k8s on Notes
channel.description: Recent content in k8s on Notes

item.title: Change NodePort range local kubernetes
item.description: Change NodePort range local kubernetes Add following line to add following line to /etc/kubernetes/manifests/kube-apiserver.yaml - --service-node-port-range=80-32767 Examples sudo vi /etc/kubernetes/manifests/kube-apiserver.yaml - --advertise-address=172.168.2.11 - --service-cluster-ip-range=10.96.0.0/12 - --service-node-port-range=80-32767 - --client-ca-file=/etc/kubernetes/pki/ca.crt
